user.title: Set up Bitaxe Fleet
user.description: Create the fleet manager. Add private AxeOS miner addresses through Configure after setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Bitaxe Fleet fleet manager can be configured.

init.title: Add Bitaxe miner
init.description: Enter a private IPv4 address for a miner running AxeOS. Bitaxe Fleet verifies its identity before enrollment.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the miner.
error.not_bitaxe: This address did not return a valid AxeOS miner response.
error.not_ready: Bitaxe Fleet is not ready. Try again after setup finishes.
